extDescription.message: Seamlessly sync your web AI conversations to your local Agent.

portLabel.description: Label for the server port input

tip.message: For long conversations, please scroll up to ensure all context is loaded.
tip.description: Tip message shown below the sync button

agentOnline.description: Status when agent server is reachable

agentOffline.description: Status when agent server is unreachable

unsupportedSite.message: Please use this on Supported AI websites.
unsupportedSite.description: Error when used on unsupported site

agentNotResponding.description: Error when agent server does not respond

darkTitle.description: Tooltip for dark mode toggle button

lightTitle.description: Tooltip for light mode toggle button

langTitle.description: Tooltip for language toggle button - shows what language it will switch to

noResults.description: Message when search returns no results

justNow.description: Time display for very recent items

scanBtn.description: Button to scan current page for conversations

noTurnsFound.message: No conversations found on this page

batchScanBtn.description: Button to batch scan recent conversations from history
